name: test-driven-development
description: Strict test-driven development workflow for Codex with red-green-refactor discipline and testing anti-pattern guidance.

interface.longDescription: A standalone TDD plugin for Codex. It enforces write-the-test-first discipline, verifies red before green, and includes anti-pattern guidance for mocks and production-test boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use strict TDD for this fix
Check this test setup for anti-patterns
